note: Deny-by-default risk classes for LIVE walkthrough sessions (WalkPolicy.blocked_actions — docs/live-walkthrough-safety.md). Each category carries EN+DE term lists; a click/select/key(Enter-on-submit) whose target element's accessible name/text contains one of the enabled categories' terms (case-insensitive substring) is REFUSED and logged as a policy_block. All categories are enabled by default; a policy may disable one explicitly via blocked_categories. Add a term, no code change — but never narrow this file to make a session 'work': over-blocking is the intended failure mode.
